title: DR Congo: Efforts ramp up as Ebola outbreak accelerates beyond borders
content:
The spread of Ebola is accelerating in the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) amid continued armed violence, posing a grave and growing risk to the region, UN agencies warned on Friday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post DR Congo: Efforts ramp up as Ebola outbreak accelerates beyond borders appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
snippet: The spread of Ebola is accelerating in the eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) amid continued armed violence, posing a grave and growing risk to the region, UN agencies warned on Friday.

title: Ebola treatment capacity expands in DR Congo as WHO issues new guidelines
content:
Treatment capacity for the rare and deadly Bundibugyo species of Ebola is expanding in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), as the World Health Organization (WHO) warns that community mistrust remains a major challenge to ending the outbreak. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Ebola treatment capacity expands in DR Congo as WHO issues new guidelines appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: WHO commends Uganda’s Ebola response, urges vigilance and regional cooperation
content:
The head of the World Health Organization (WHO) has praised Uganda’s response to an Ebola outbreak that has spread from neighbouring Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), while warning that continued vigilance and cross-border cooperation will be critical to stopping transmission. Read Full Story on UN News

The post WHO commends Uganda’s Ebola response, urges vigilance and regional cooperation appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Ebola in DR Congo: One month on, scaled up response remains insufficient
content:
One month after the Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak was declared in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda, case numbers continue to rise.  Read Full Story on UN News

title: DR Congo: Ebola spreads as agencies brace for child victims
content:
The deadly Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is continuing to spread with a spike in child infections an increasingly likely scenario in the days ahead, UN agencies said on Friday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post DR Congo: Ebola spreads as agencies brace for child victims appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Building trust and lab testing at the heart of DRC Ebola response: WHO
content:
In Ebola-stricken eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) a massive push for early testing and contact tracing is helping to contain the virus, the UN World Health Organization (WHO) said on Tuesday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Building trust and lab testing at the heart of DRC Ebola response: WHO appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Why sustainable alternatives to plastic are struggling to compete
content:
Plastic pollution is choking the ocean, but sustainable alternatives - including seaweed - remain held back by tariffs, fragmented regulations and the overwhelming market advantage enjoyed by fossil fuel-based plastics.  Read Full Story on UN News

The post Why sustainable alternatives to plastic are struggling to compete appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: ‘Rare, untreatable strain’: Ebola toll mounts in eastern DR Congo
content:
The top UN aid official in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is in Ituri province – the epicentre of the country's Ebola outbreak – for a three-day assessment visit, as the confirmed case count reaches 515 across three eastern provinces. Read Full Story on UN News

The post ‘Rare, untreatable strain’: Ebola toll mounts in eastern DR Congo appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
